headline: Regeneron: Fairly Valued Now After A Stellar Upswing
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a Buy: Dupixent growth offsets Eylea declines; pipeline/Libtayo impact post-2026; monitor ROIC & SBC. Click for a REGN update.
